mapper.select: select * from fp_environment where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc
select * from fp_environment where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_environment where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and env_code = #{envCode}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_environment (id, tenant_id, env_code, env_name, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{envCode}, #{envName}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_environment where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
